title: Share Board w/ Team API
excerpt:
I’m curious with the new feature allowing Teams to become owner of boards if the API will be updated? 
I want to make teams owners of new boards created rather than just subscribers using GraphQL API in Make.

posts.author: nyoung (Nik Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m curious with the new feature allowing Teams to become owner of boards if the API will be updated?

I want to make teams owners of new boards created rather than just subscribers using GraphQL API in Make.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @nyoung,

That is not possible at the moment, but if it changes, we will for sure announce it in our changelog

Cheers,
Matias
